gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 35, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento35 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 36, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento36 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 34, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nElemento35=0 AND nElemento36=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nElemento35=1 AND nElemento36=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nElemento35=1 OR nElemento36=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
